item.title: Why INGOs Struggle to Launch Impact Funds
item.description: A look at the structural and political barriers INGOs face when spinning up impact investing funds, with lessons from Oxfam, CARE, and WaterEquity. Brand risk, board governance, and the GP-vs-sub-advisor decision loom large.

item.title: Sub-advisor Models: The Rise of Symbiotics and Bamboo
item.description: Why sub-advised fund structures are growing for INGO cornerstone LPs. Symbiotics, Bamboo Capital, and Incofin have each taken on multiple INGO-partnered mandates since 2024.
